title: Backend & JVM
description: Runtime health, HTTP performance, garbage collection and database pool saturation.

targets.rawSql: SELECT argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS cpu FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'profile' AND MetricName = 'jvm.cpu.recent_utilization'

SELECT sum(value) AS connections FROM (SELECT Attributes, argMax(Value, TimeUnix) AS value FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'profile' AND MetricName = 'db.client.connections.usage' AND Attributes['state'] = 'used' GROUP BY Attributes)
SELECT if(sum(Count)=0, 0, sum(Sum)/sum(Count)) AS latency FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'profile' AND MetricName = 'http.server.request.duration'
SELECT if(sum(Count)=0, 0, sum(Sum)/sum(Count)) AS pause FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'profile' AND MetricName = 'jvm.gc.duration'

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, Attributes['jvm.memory.pool.name'] AS pool, avg(Value) AS bytes FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'profile' AND MetricName = 'jvm.memory.used' GROUP BY time, pool ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, avg(Value) AS cpu FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'profile' AND MetricName = 'jvm.cpu.recent_utilization' GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, Attributes['http.request.method'] AS method, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) AS avg_duration FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'profile' AND MetricName = 'http.server.request.duration' AND Count > 0 GROUP BY time, method ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(TimeUnix) AS time, sum(Sum)/sum(Count) AS avg_wait FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE $__timeFilter(TimeUnix) AND ServiceName = 'profile' AND MetricName = 'db.client.connections.wait_time' AND Count > 0 GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT * FROM (SELECT Timestamp, SpanName AS request, round(Duration / 1000000, 2) AS duration_ms, StatusCode, TraceId FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE $__timeFilter(Timestamp) AND ServiceName = 'profile' AND SpanKind = 'Server' ORDER BY Duration DESC LIMIT 50) ORDER BY Timestamp ASC
